title: A CS Professor on Why Slow Learning Wins in the AI Era | CU Boulder, Tom Yeh
summary: Tom Yeh argues for teaching AI through hand-written mathematical foundations at human speed rather than focusing on latest tools. He contends that strong fundamentals survive hype cycles and that people, not AI, drive meaningful change in AI development.
